title: Creatine Reserve™ Dual Pathway Creatine Complex
body_html:
Dual Pathway, Not Single Pathway. Most creatine on the market is just monohydrate. Monohydrate alone is built for muscle — it goes to the cells that power physical performance, fills your stores, and stops there. Creatine Reserve adds 750 mg of GAA, the molecule your body uses to make its own creatine. GAA crosses the blood-brain barrier through SLC6A8, the brain’s preferred transporter. The muscle version can’t use this pathway.*

The Cognitive Part of Your Stack, Consolidated. Reserve replaces the separate creatine, GAA, B-complex, and taurine bottles most longevity stacks already include. One capsule. Active methylated B6, B9, and B12 — the cofactors your body actually uses to convert creatine and GAA into the phosphocreatine your brain runs on.*

No Loading. No Bloat. No Powder. The 20–25 g loading phase is the reason creatine got its bloat reputation. Reserve skips it. 3,000 mg + 750 mg GAA daily reaches saturation in 3–4 weeks. Capsules — no scoops, no shakers, no flavors, no grit.*

Size: 60 Capsules - 60 Servings / 120 Capsules - 120 Servings 

  • TQ-AdvancedⓇ 4X is an extra-strength Black Seed Extract with 20% Thymoquinone (TQ) concentrations and 50 mg of Thymoquinone per capsule.
  • TQ-AdvancedⓇ 4X with Thymoquinone may support a variety of health-related benefits, including immunity, heart health, joint function, hair & skin, digestion, liver health, brain health & function, comfort, and weight management.*

TQ-AdvancedⓇ 4X is an extra-strength Black Seed Extract with 20% Thymoquinone (TQ) concentrations and 25 mg of Thymoquinone per capsule. TQ is the active nutrient in Black Seed Oil (Nigella sativa). This nutrient is widely studied and recognized for its beneficial properties. Thymoquinone has been associated with multiple potential health benefits. It may support immunity, heart health, joint function, hair & skin, digestion, liver health, brain health & function, comfort, and weight management.*

title: Triquetra On-The-Go Pill Case
body_html: Stay consistent with your supplements wherever life takes you. This compact, durable pill case is designed for daily convenience — a secure twist closure to prevent spills, and a slim, travel-friendly size that fits easily into your pocket, purse, or gym bag. Perfect for keeping your Triquetra supplements with you at work, the gym, or on the go while traveling.

title: Triquetra Shaker Bottle
body_html: Mix your supplements smoothly and take them anywhere with ease. The Triquetra Shaker Bottle features a secure, leak-proof lid, durable BPA-free construction for lump-free shakes every time. Its lightweight, portable design makes it perfect for your gym sessions, office, or daily on-the-go use — keeping your nutrition routine simple, clean, and consistent.
